tool.name: sheets_bulk_read
tool.description: Read a cell range from multiple Google Spreadsheets in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Pass all spreadsheet URLs as a single comma-separated string. Each spreadsheet will be opened in a separate tab and the specified range will be read from each.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Cell range in A1 notation to read from each spreadsheet (e.g. 'A1:C10')
